title: Network Error when calling Xano API
symptom: Users experience a 'Network Error' when uploading photos to Xano via Weweb. This error occurs after several successful uploads, indicating a potential issue with the workflow complexity.
applies_when: Executing a complex workflow with multiple iterations
not_this_if: Error occurs on the first upload attempt
root_cause: The error arises due to the complexity of the workflow exceeding the constraints of the user's Xano plan. Even without a rate limit, there are underlying resource constraints that can lead to network errors during execution.
fix_steps: Optimize the Xano workflow to reduce complexity
Break down the upload process into smaller, manageable tasks
Test the workflow after each change to ensure stability
agent_instruction: Optimize the Xano workflow to reduce its complexity and test the uploads again.
